title: thelypteris wulingshanensis
intro: Thelypteris wulingshanensis, a species of fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris wulingshanensis include reducing fever, relieving cough and asthma symptoms, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as an infusion or decoction to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
